risks.title: Benchmark system produces contradictory signals
risks.root_cause: RC-7: Case identity normalization broken; repeats inflate coverage
risks.mitigation: Normalize case IDs, separate canonical from sample traces, fail on missing canonical IDs

risks.title: Runtime success signals emitted without verification
risks.blast_radius: operator confidence, downstream health monitoring, benchmark validity
risks.mitigation: Split lifecycle states, hard-fail unverifiable completion

risks.title: Declarative config surface exceeds executable enforcement
risks.root_cause: RC-1: Policy corpus added faster than code consumers
risks.mitigation: Reduce or validate every declarative surface against live consumers

risks.title: Persona documents are governance artifacts, not runtime inputs
risks.root_cause: RC-5: ZeraCommandOS injects metadata headers, not persona content
risks.mitigation: Load persona docs into runtime prompt assembly or demote to operator reference

risks.title: Anti-sycophancy has zero runtime enforcement
risks.root_cause: RC-5: Constitution rules are prose-only constraints
risks.blast_radius: Zera response quality under flattery/emotional pressure
risks.mitigation: Implement programmatic sycophancy detector or promote constitution to executable contracts

risks.title: Memory policy layer bypassed by runtime
risks.blast_radius: memory discipline, persona contamination, cross-session bleed
risks.mitigation: Route all memory operations through MemoryPolicyLayer

risks.title: Persona governor exists but never called
risks.root_cause: RC-10: evaluate_governor() has no caller in execution path
risks.blast_radius: long-session persona drift, emotional closeness escalation
risks.mitigation: Call evaluate_governor() at persona config load time

risks.title: MCP validator returns success on failure
risks.root_cause: Exit code always 0 regardless of routing mismatch

risks.title: Runtime provider declared but not registered
risks.root_cause: mlx_lm in runtime_providers.json but no factory in RuntimeRegistry
risks.mitigation: Add contract test: every enabled provider must have a factory

risks.title: External cron operates outside repo governance
Motion-aware routing has zero executable backing
risks.root_cause: RC-8: Config written as design spec, no implementation
risks.blast_radius: false capability expectations for motion tasks
risks.mitigation: Implement or remove the config block

risks.title: Registry workflow resolution silently fails
risks.root_cause: RC-9: configs/registry/ does not exist, exception caught silently
risks.blast_radius: workflow context loss for all tasks
risks.mitigation: Emit warn event or remove call path

risks.title: Mode collapsing to 100% plan mode
risks.root_cause: Keyword-based router collapses all traffic to plan mode
risks.blast_radius: Zera persona never exercises full range of modes
risks.mitigation: Improve mode routing with semantic understanding or confidence thresholds

risks.title: Self-evolution loop lacks runtime gating
risks.root_cause: RC-10: Self-evolution operates as external script without review
risks.blast_radius: persona config integrity, long-term behavior stability
risks.mitigation: Gate self-evolution changes through review pipeline

risks.title: Context injection without budget tracking
risks.blast_radius: context window overflow risk, token cost unpredictability
risks.mitigation: Add context budget tracking and warn events
